Our Foundation

Purpose, Mission & Vision

P
Our Purpose
To release God's people into their God-given purpose and destiny within the kingdom.
1 Peter 2:9
M
Mission Statement
We will love God's people from brokenness to restoration and victory.
1 Corinthians 13
V
Vision
Empowering People for Purpose!
The heartbeat of everything we do.

Explore Our Church

What Would You Like
to Explore?

Anointed Leadership

Meet Our Leaders

God has blessed Purpose Church with Spirit-filled leaders whose hearts beat for His people — from brokenness into fullness of purpose.

Founding Pastors

Head Pastor & First Lady

Pastor Michael & First Lady Mal Herron
Senior Pastor & First Lady · Founders of Purpose Church of Denton
Senior Pastor & Founder
Pastor Michael Herron

Pastor Michael Herron received the call of God after seven years of faithful service in youth ministry and worship at Believers International Church. Obedient to the voice of God, he and First Lady Mal planted Purpose Church of Denton beginning with a single home Bible study. On their very first night, Pastor Mike was led to deliver a word about Purpose — and Purpose Church was born.

His anointed leadership, heart for people, and uncompromising commitment to the Word of God have guided Purpose Church through over a decade of Spirit-filled ministry and growth.

First Lady & Co-Founder
First Lady Mal Herron

First Lady Mal Herron has been a cornerstone of Purpose Church since its very first night. Serving alongside Pastor Mike as a gifted Praise and Worship Leader before the founding of Purpose Church, her heart for God's people and her deep commitment to worship helped shape the spiritual culture of Purpose Church from day one.

First Lady Mal leads with grace, love, and a genuine care for every member of the Purpose Church family. She continues to lead the Praise & Worship ministry with anointing and joy.

"
We will love God's people from brokenness to restoration and victory. That is our mission, our calling, and our commitment to every soul that walks through these doors.
— Pastor Michael & First Lady Mal Herron

Men's Ministry Leader
Men's Ministry

Join the TeamPurpose Church is always looking for Spirit-filled, gifted individuals ready to serve. If you feel called to ministry and would like to explore serving at Purpose Church, please speak with Pastor Mike or First Lady Mal after Sunday service.

Our Doctrine

What We Believe

We believe that if we show love to all people, they will come to know Jesus and begin to walk out and fulfill their God-given purpose in life.

✝
Love must be the foundation of your gift for God's anointing to be entrusted in you for the benefit of His people.
📖
We believe in the unadulterated word of God as the final authority in all matters of faith and life.
☁️
We believe in the Trinity: The Father, The Son, and The Holy Ghost — three persons, one God.
🕊️
We believe that Jesus is God's only begotten Son, sent to redeem all of humanity.
🙏
We believe in the death, burial, and resurrection of Jesus Christ as the cornerstone of our faith.
🌿
We believe in the five-fold ministry: Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists, Pastors, and Teachers. (Ephesians 4:11)
⚓
We believe in the restoration and building up of God's people through community, discipleship, and love.
🔑
We believe that faith is the key to unlocking your destiny and fulfilling everything God has placed inside of you.
☀️
We believe that the joy of the Lord is our strength and it should be exhibited in every area of our lives. (Nehemiah 8:10)

"Empowering People for Purpose"

At Purpose Church of Denton, everything we do flows from these core beliefs. Our purpose, mission, and vision are all grounded in the Word of God and expressed through the love we show to every person who walks through our doors.

You're Always Welcome

Plan Your Visit

We are so excited you're considering joining us. Here's everything you need to know before you come.

10:00 AM – 1:00 PM

👶

We love kids! Children are welcome in service. Ask about our children's ministry upon arrival.

What to Expect

Your First Sunday

🙌
Ministry Time
We believe in the move of the Holy Spirit. There is opportunity for prayer, ministry, and connection.
🎵
Worship
Experience powerful, anointed praise and worship led by First Lady Mal Herron and the Purpose Church worship team.
📖
The Word
Pastor Michael Herron delivers practical, Spirit-filled messages rooted in the Word of God that speak to your life.
🤝
Community
Purpose Church is a family. You will be welcomed, celebrated, and embraced from the moment you walk through the door.

The Word of God

Sermon Notes

Revisit the Word delivered each Sunday. Sermon titles, scriptures, and Pastor Mike's notes from recent messages.

Get Connected

Church Groups

Community is at the heart of Purpose Church. Find your place, connect with others, and grow together in faith and purpose.

✝📚
Women's Ministry
Ladies Book Study

A Spirit-led book study for the women of Purpose Church. We gather to study impactful books rooted in faith, purpose, and the Word of God. It's more than reading — it's community, accountability, and growth.

Men's Ministry
Men's Book Study

Purpose Church men gather to sharpen each other through the reading of powerful books on faith, leadership, fatherhood, and purpose. Iron sharpens iron — this is a space for real men pursuing real growth.

Prayer Warriors
